name: stuart-plugins
description: Personal collection of Claude Code plugins for development workflows and productivity

plugins.name: auto-format
plugins.description: Auto-format files after Claude edits them. Supports Go, Rust, Python, and JS/TS.

plugins.name: efficient-commands
plugins.description: Teaches Claude to use shell commands efficiently — avoid re-running expensive commands and stop tail/head chasing.

plugins.name: tsgo-lsp
plugins.description: TypeScript 7 native LSP — uses tsgo for faster type checking and diagnostics.

plugins.name: bevy
plugins.description: Authoritative idioms for Bevy 0.19 game projects in Rust — ECS, communication, scheduling, plugins, assets, UI, errors, testing, performance.

plugins.name: tech-writing
plugins.description: Write and clean up documentation and code comments that read like a terse senior engineer wrote them — present-tense, say-once, no filler, no AI tells.
